specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel in Peak Condition
content.about:
Welcome to Ben's Boatworks, a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel running at its best through every season. We specialize in a comprehensive range of marine services — from detailed boat surveying and inspection to diving and underwater work, marine AC and climate control, and marine plumbing and sanitation. Whether you're a weekend boater or a liveaboard, we're here to make sure your boat is safe, comfortable, and seaworthy.

At Ben's Boatworks, we bring hands-on expertise to every job. Our boat surveying and inspection services give you a thorough, honest assessment of your vessel's condition — whether you're buying, selling, or just want peace of mind. Our diving and underwater services handle hull inspections, prop work, and underwater repairs without hauling out. We service and install marine AC and climate control systems to keep your cabin comfortable in South Florida's heat, and our marine plumbing and sanitation work covers everything from through-hulls to holding tanks and Y-valves.

We serve boat owners across South Florida and surrounding waters within a 60-mile radius of Annapolis, MD. Our customers count on us because we treat every vessel like it matters — because it does. A boat is a significant investment, and we take that seriously. From the Chesapeake Bay to coastal waterways, Ben's Boatworks is the marine services partner you can rely on to get the job done right.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing. Serving South Florida within 60 miles. Call today!

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A thorough boat survey covers structural integrity, mechanical systems, electrical components, and safety equipment to give you a clear picture of your vessel's condition. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey, insurance survey, or condition-and-value report, Ben's Boatworks delivers an honest, detailed assessment you can act on.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Underwater services eliminate the need to haul out for many common below-the-waterline tasks, saving time and money. Ben's Boatworks handles hull inspections, propeller removal and installation, zinc replacement, line and debris removal, and underwater repairs to keep your vessel in the water and ready to go.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Marine air conditioning systems require specialized knowledge of refrigerant handling, raw water cooling circuits, and electrical integration aboard a vessel. Ben's Boatworks installs, services, and troubleshoots marine AC and climate control systems to ensure reliable, efficient operation and a comfortable onboard environment year-round.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Proper marine plumbing and sanitation systems are essential for vessel safety, compliance, and comfort aboard any boat. Ben's Boatworks services and installs through-hulls, seacocks, bilge pumps, freshwater systems, holding tanks, Y-valves, and marine heads — ensuring everything works correctly and meets Coast Guard sanitation regulations.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection for buyers
Hull inspection and zinc replacement via dive without haulout
Marine AC system installation and refrigerant service aboard vessels
Holding tank and Y-valve replacement for sanitation compliance
Propeller removal, inspection, and reinstallation underwater
Freshwater system repair and through-hull seacock replacement
Insurance or damage survey following a marine incident or grounding
